summary:
Iteration 3 E2E for NK Prestige Steel. Backend: 14/14 new pytest tests PASS (brochure PDF %PDF magic + attachment + >3KB, Projects CRUD + only_visible + auth guard, forgot-password with debug_link and no-leak on unknown email, reset-password full flow with token single-use + short-password rejection, change-password wrong-current 401 + change/revert flow, BusinessInfo google_analytics_id + google_search_console_verification round-trip, /api/gallery/upload -> /api/files/{path} async storage roundtrip fast (<20s), robots.txt has Sitemap:, sitemap.xml has >=6 URLs and https:// canonical PUBLIC_URL). Regression: 31/34 legacy passed; 3 failures inherited from iter2 (tagline reverted by legacy test, gallery-seed check due to test artifact, pickup rate-limit due to k8s multi-IP ingress).

Frontend: verified /manifest.json 200 application/json with short_name='NK Prestige Steel', /service-worker.js 200, index.html has <link rel='manifest'> + apple-touch-icon + theme-color=#060B14, title includes 'NK Prestige Steel'. Navbar Projects link present + /projects page renders projects/empty state. Footer 'DOWNLOAD BROCHURE PDF' link (data-testid='download-brochure') targets /api/brochure.pdf in new tab. /login has 'FORGOT PASSWORD?' link (data-testid='forgot-link') -> /forgot-password page (data-testid='forgot-email-input' + 'forgot-submit-btn') -> dev link block (data-testid='forgot-dev-link') renders with reset-password?token=... URL. /reset-password?token=... form (reset-password-input + reset-confirm-input testids) accepts new password and redirects to /login with success toast — verified end-to-end. Admin login works with restored NK@Prestige2026. Change Password sidebar tab shows change-password-form (data-testid='change-password-form') with 3 password inputs and UPDATE PASSWORD button. Business Info tab shows Google Analytics ID + GSC Verification inputs (labeled 'GOOGLE ANALYTICS ID (G-XXXXXXX)' and 'GSC VERIFICATION (META CONTENT)'). Admin Projects tab is present in sidebar. Admin password reset back to NK@Prestige2026 at end (verified).

minor.issue: Pickup rate-limit still not triggering — same k8s multi-source-IP root cause; not iter3 regression.

BusinessInfo tagline reverted by legacy backend_test.py to "India's Trusted Scrap Recycling Partner" which conflicts with rebrand default 'Premium Scrap Dealer & Metal Trading' — causes test_iteration2::test_extras_present intermittent fail depending on test order.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid="admin-tab-projects" and data-testid="admin-tab-security" NOT present in DOM although UI sidebar items 'Projects' and 'Change Password' render and are clickable. Spec requested these testids.

data-testid="info-google_analytics_id" and data-testid="info-google_search_console_verification" NOT present on the GA/GSC inputs (labels 'GOOGLE ANALYTICS ID' and 'GSC VERIFICATION' render fine). Testing agents will fail to locate these fields by testid.

The dev-link element renders as a div (not <a>), so href attribute is None; the URL is inside the text content. Consider wrapping the reset-password URL in an <a href='...' data-testid='forgot-dev-link'> so click navigates in-app.

issues: Tagline still shows 'India's Trusted Scrap Recycling Partner' due to iter2 legacy test revert; rebrand target is 'Premium Scrap Dealer & Metal Trading'.

action_items: Add data-testid="admin-tab-projects" and data-testid="admin-tab-security" to the corresponding sidebar tab buttons in Admin.jsx (Projects + Change Password items).
Add data-testid="info-google_analytics_id" and data-testid="info-google_search_console_verification" to the two new inputs in BusinessInfoTab (GA ID and GSC verification).
(nice-to-have) In ForgotPassword.jsx, render the dev reset link as an actual <a href={debug_link} data-testid='forgot-dev-link'> so it's clickable and has an href attribute.

(carry-over from iter2) Fix backend_test.py::TestBusinessInfo::test_update_business_info to revert to 'Premium Scrap Dealer & Metal Trading' instead of legacy 'India's Trusted Scrap Recycling Partner' — currently keeps rebrand out-of-sync.
(carry-over from iter2) Fix rate-limit key_func to use X-Forwarded-For so slowapi + brute-force lockout work behind k8s ingress.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1361 lines (still growing) — should be split into routers/models/services (>700 loc guideline).
aput_object/aget_object correctly use httpx AsyncClient — the previous iter2 finding about sync requests in async endpoints is FIXED for gallery + pickup uploads and /api/files.

reportlab brochure generation is done synchronously inside an async endpoint (build_brochure_pdf() blocks the event loop for the duration). For low traffic it's fine, but consider running in a threadpool via asyncio.to_thread() for scalability.
password_reset_tokens collection: verified token single-use (used=true) enforcement. Consider also adding an explicit `expires_at` TTL index in Mongo for automatic cleanup.

/api/auth/forgot-password returns debug_link in prod-shaped response — clearly labeled dev-only in UI, but this endpoint should hide debug_link when EMAIL provider is configured; currently it will always leak the link.

New BusinessInfo fields (google_analytics_id, google_search_console_verification) have no server-side format validation (e.g., regex ^G-[A-Z0-9]+$). Frontend lib/analytics.jsx validates client-side only.

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 iter3 tests); 31/34 legacy+iter2 (3 known iter2 fails carried over)
success_rate.frontend: ~90% (all functionality works; 4 requested data-testids missing on admin tabs + GA/GSC inputs)

test_credentials: admin@nkprestigesteel.com / NK@Prestige2026 (verified working at end of run — reset multiple times during tests, all reverted)
seed_data_creation: None persisted. Cleaned up: gallery upload item created during async-storage test (deleted), 'BMTC Dismantling Test' project (deleted via API), GA/GSC test values cleared, admin password reverted to NK@Prestige2026 twice (once via reset-password, once via change-password).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter3 test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py. Run: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_iteration3.py -o addopts='' -v. All 14 pass on clean state. Key testids present: forgot-link, forgot-email-input, forgot-submit-btn, forgot-dev-link, reset-password-input, reset-confirm-input, change-password-form, download-brochure. Key testids MISSING (main agent to add): admin-tab-projects, admin-tab-security, info-google_analytics_id, info-google_search_console_verification. Password reset flow is fully functional end-to-end via UI. Admin password is guaranteed reset to NK@Prestige2026 at end of this run.
rca_of_the_issue: Missing data-testids: main agent implemented the UI features (Projects tab, Change Password tab, GA ID + GSC verification inputs) but did not add the exact data-testid strings requested by the spec on those elements. Only change-password-form has its testid. Adding these attributes is a 5-line change in Admin.jsx.
